channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Crow-Armstrong homers twice and Cubs take series with 4-2 victory over Dodgers
item.description: Pete Crow-Armstrong hit his first two home runs of the season, including a go-ahead solo shot in the seventh inning, Michael Busch homered against his former team again and the Chicago Cubs beat the Los Angeles Dodgers 4-2 on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Rory McIlroy wins Masters playoff to complete the career Grand Slam
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — The closer Rory McIlroy came to fulfilling his lifetime dream — winning the Masters — the more it kept slipping away. Sunday at Augusta National felt like his last 11 years in the majors, blunders mixed in with sheer brilliance. A two-shot lead gone in two holes.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: After a wayward Sunday at the Masters, Bryson DeChambeau is 'super excited' about tweaking his gear
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — Bryson DeChambeau believed his game was in good enough shape to win the Masters. He certainly thought he could do it after he leapfrogged Rory McIlroy to take the lead two holes into the final round Sunday.
item.dc:creator: BEN NUCKOLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kyren Lacy led deputies on police chase before dying of 'self-inflicted gunshot wound,' officials say
item.description: Texas officials release details surrounding the death of former LSU Tigers star wide receiver Kyren Lacy on Sunday after he was pronounced dead Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The dead in upstate New York plane crash included 2022 NCAA woman of the year and family members
item.description: A private plane that crashed in upstate New York over the weekend was carrying six members of a close-knit family of physicians and distinguished student-athletes on a trip to the Catskills for a birthday celebration and the Passover holiday.
item.dc:creator: JAKE OFFENHARTZ, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Palou finally loses as IndyCar champ's 2-race winning streak snapped by Kirkwood in Long Beach
item.description: LONG BEACH, Calif. (AP) — Kyle Kirkwood showed that Alex Palou can be beat this IndyCar season and returned Andretti Global to the top of the podium with his second career victory at the Grand Prix of Long Beach.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: In Year 20, the Spurs' Chris Paul starts all 82 games. And he made some history in the process
item.description: In Year 20, Chris Paul started all 82. And he made some NBA history in the process. Paul was in the San Antonio Spurs' starting lineup for their season finale on Sunday, making him the first player to ever make 82 starts this deep into a career.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Celtics star Jaylen Brown received injections in right knee, coach Joe Mazzulla says
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Boston Celtics coach Joe Mazzulla on Sunday confirmed a report that Jaylen Brown received injections during the week to help his troublesome right knee that’s limited his playing time the past month. It was first reported by ESPN that Brown received pain management injections.
item.dc:creator: KEN POWTAK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tigers pitching prospect, son of Masters competitor, picks up 1st career MLB win
item.description: Detroit Tigers pitcher Jackson Jobe, the son of Masters golfer Brandt Jobe, picked up the first win of his Major League Baseball career on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cubs have big night in 16-0 rout of Dodgers
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Chicago Cubs had a big night against the defending champion Los Angeles Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: MIKE DIGIOVANNA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fan reaches into Mike Trout's glove to snatch a catch from Angels outfielder
item.description: A fan grabbed the ball out of Mike Trout's glove after the Los Angeles Angels star reached into the right field stands Saturday night to make what appeared to be a great catch against the Houston Astros
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Baldwin's pinch-hit single in 9th lifts White Sox over Red Sox 3-2
item.description: Pinch-hitter Brooks Baldwin lined an RBI single off Boston closer Aroldis Chapman with one out in the bottom of the ninth, lifting the Chicago White Sox to a 3-2 win over the Red Sox on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Cowboys' Dak Prescott says he could 'definitely' play 'today' as he recovers from hamstring injury
item.description: Dallas Cowboys quarterback Dak Prescott said that he "definitely" could play right now after he underwent surgery on his hamstring in November.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 89th Masters Tournament
item.description: It's "Moving Day" at the 89th Masters Tournament at Augusta National Golf Club. The term refers to golfers who made the cut trying to get themselves into position on the leader board to win on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: John Hart, Fox 5

item.title: Chicago Fire face Inter Miami in Eastern Conference action
item.description: Inter Miami CF (4-0-2, second in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Fire (3-2-2, sixth in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Sunday, 4:30 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Blackhawks score 4 3rd-period goals for 5-2 win over Bruins
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Nick Foligno scored a pair of goals, Arvid Soderblom made 31 saves and the Chicago Blackhawks beat the Boston Bruins 5-2 on Thursday night. Ryan Donato, Tyler Bertuzzi and Kevin Korchinski also had goals for the Blackhawks, who scored four goals in third period to pull away.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah falls in shootout in home finale, 4-3
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In the final game at the Delta Center in their inaugural season, the Utah Hockey Club lost a thriller in a shootout to the Nashville Predators Thursday night, 4-3.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bulls beat Heat behind Giddey's triple-double, move ahead of Miami for play-in home game
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — The Bulls have just one game left at the United Center on their regular-season schedule. But they took a big step toward securing at least one more home game for the Eastern Conference play-in tournament.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Congrats to Beth - the Beat Big Will Bracket Challenge Winner
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — The final buzzer has sounded. The confetti has fallen. The Florida Gators are National Champions. KREX Sports Anchor Big Will Levenson was in the building to watch his Alma Mater Florida rise to the top of the College Basketball World. "Greatest experience of my life.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Bulls favored to land Nikola Jokic if traded, odds maker says
item.description: If the Denver Nuggets were to trade Nikola Jokic, the Chicago Bulls are the top landing spot according to Bookies.com's Adam Thompson, who gave the Bulls a +500 odds to acquire the 3-time NBA MVP.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Erik Karlsson scores his 200th goal as the Penguins beat the Blackhawks 5-0
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Erik Karlsson scored his 200th career goal to help the Pittsburgh Penguins beat the Chicago Blackhawks 5-0 on Tuesday night. Sidney Crosby and Kris Letang also scored for Pittsburgh, which lost 3-1 at Chicago on Sunday. Kevin Hayes added two goals in the third period.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Nuggets fire head coach, GM with three games remaining before the playoffs
item.description: The decision comes as the Nuggets only have three regular-season games remaining before the NBA playoffs.
item.dc:creator: Spencer Kristensen, NewsNation

item.title: Trump honors Dodgers' 2024 World Series championship team
item.description: (KTLA) -- President Donald Trump welcomed Shohei Ohtani, Mookie Betts and the reigning champion Los Angeles Dodgers to the White House on Monday to congratulate them for winning the World Series last season. "That is a very good-looking group of people," Trump said as he began his remarks.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KRON4

item.title: Jaquan Brisker's bond with Bears' DC Dennis Allen predates his NFL career
item.description: Jaquan Brisker was originally drafted by the Saints, but instead joined the Bears, where he will be reunited with his former defensive coordinator, Dennis Allen, who is now the Bears' defensive coordinator.
item.dc:creator: Kaitlin Sharkey, WGN 9
